content_body: What a great thanksgiving week we had! The weather was perfect ~ sunrises were beautiful ~ the cabin and the land are amazing ~ it was a great escape from our busy lives. We absolutely love it here. The kids enjoyed the wildlife - deer, groundhogs, turkey - they loved the pond and the river - they loved the game room. It was just perfect. We will be back! The LaSalle Family
title: Thanksgiving at Cherokee Sunrise
